name: New Pricing JSON Detected
description: When a JSON file is dropped into the upload folder, auto-generate a proposal table

then.prompt: A new pricing calculator JSON file was just added to the 'upload json file here' folder. Read the file, get the customer name from the JSON 'Name' field, then say: 'I found the estimate for **{name}**. Generating your proposal table now...' — then immediately generate the HTML output file following the sales-tools steering instructions. Save the HTML as 'upload json file here/{name}_proposal_table.html' and open it in the browser.
